message:
fix(clippy): doc_markdown backticks and as-usize casts in test files

Add backticks around `create_provider` in ollama e2e doc comment to
satisfy clippy::doc_markdown. Replace four `as usize` casts with
`usize::try_from(...).unwrap()` in provider discrepancy classification
tests to satisfy clippy::cast_possible_truncation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
